channel.title: AGN Sciences With Euclid on Yuming Fu's Homepage
channel.description: Recent content in AGN Sciences With Euclid on Yuming Fu's Homepage

item.title: Euclid Q1 spectroscopy of bright quasars
item.description: Our paper “Euclid Quick Data Release (Q1). XXXVIII. Euclid spectroscopy of quasars. 1. Identification and redshift determination of 3500 bright quasars” has been accepted by Astronomy & Astrophysics.
